violations.text: Ice observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine, knife) were observed with an accumulation of pink and brown residues, and dried food. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is being cleaned and sanitized. Knife was moved to the warewashing area to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the main entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

Hose used to wash/rinse dishes is in poor repair. Lange amount of water is leaking when the water is on, spilling onto the floor. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Per interview of PIC, a new part has been ordered to repair this hose. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of residue and other debris. Ice machine is to be cleaned today. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and pink residues. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was emptied to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

The ice machine is not in good repair. Tape observed under the cover (in the corner) and also on the outer bottom section of the machine. Tape is not smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. Ice machine is to be properly repaired/replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023
Leak observed at the pre-wash spray hose. Pooling of water observed under this area. Plumbing must be properly repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023

The floor and wall junctures behind the 3-bay sink do not have coving. Space observed between the bottom of the wall and the floor. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023
